entries.title: Lock niche = AI-automation agency ops layer (n8n/Make/GHL). Wedge = free weekly "Agency Receipt" PDF for first 5 agencies in exchange for testimonial + call. No Stripe until 3 verbal yeses on $99/mo.
entries.desc: Highest combined score, AI-adjacent (Vitoshi network leverage), zero build cost, daily self-identifying buyers on r/n8n/r/AI_Agents/r/GoHighLevel. Free wedge avoids premature pricing; the discovery call IS the product because I'll surface the real $300/mo SaaS pain (silent-failure detection) from the conversation.

entries.title: Hunt B2B SaaS / productized-service niche. Validate before build. Concierge MVP path.
entries.desc: Recurring revenue + technical buyer + Vitoshi's network = unfair distribution. SaaS has highest LTV/CAC ceiling. Concierge MVP minimizes build before signal.
